title: Charm Forked
description: An unofficial fork of Charm by Svenhjol
body:
This is an unofficial fork of [Charm](https://modrinth.com/mod/charm), made to be used in a modpack.

A vast majority of this mod was written by Svenhjol and others and updated versions were simply not released, all credits go to the original authors. The original mod is licensed MIT, and this fork will stay the same. 

If/when the original author releases Charm on CurseForge for versions that this fork targets, and implements the fixes this fork does, this fork will no longer be updated. 

**Please do not report any issues to the original developer, report them here.**

Differences from Charm:
- Currently targeting 1.20.1 and 1.21.1 Fabric
- Made a few minor tweaks for improved mod compatibility 
- Balanced stackable enchanted book anvil combining
- (Planned): More modded item/block compatibility for certain features (totems, portals, etc.)
